requirement_topic.en: EOS Mandatory Energy-Efficiency Label for Household Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: EOS家用电冰箱强制性能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: EOS家用電冰箱強制性能效標籤

summary.en: Egypt operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling scheme for household appliances, including refrigerators, supervised by EOS (Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality) in coordination with the Ministry responsible for energy efficiency. Refrigerators placed on the Egyptian market must carry the Egyptian energy-efficiency label showing the energy-efficiency class on a graded scale and the appliance's energy consumption, determined by testing against the ES standard that adopts the IEC 62552 measurement methodology. The energy class is assigned per the Egyptian label scheme thresholds, and the label must be displayed on the product at point of sale. Models that do not meet the minimum energy-efficiency level set for refrigerators cannot be lawfully sold, and the label rating is checked as part of EOS conformity assessment and GOEIC import control. The Egyptian grid reference is 220 V, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 埃及对包括冰箱在内的家用电器实行强制性能效标签制度，由EOS（埃及标准化与质量组织）会同主管能效的部门监管。投放埃及市场的冰箱须附贴埃及能效标签，标明分级标度上的能效等级及器具能耗，能耗依据采用IEC 62552测量方法的ES标准检测确定。能效等级按埃及标签方案门槛值评定，标签须在销售点展示于产品上。未达到冰箱最低能效水平的型号不得合法销售，标签评级作为EOS合格评定及GOEIC进口管制的一部分予以核查。埃及电网基准为220 V、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 埃及對包括冰箱在內的家用電器實行強制性能效標籤制度，由EOS（埃及標準化與質量組織）會同主管能效的部門監管。投放埃及市場的冰箱須附貼埃及能效標籤，標明分級標度上的能效等級及器具能耗，能耗依據採用IEC 62552測量方法的ES標準檢測確定。能效等級按埃及標籤方案門檻值評定，標籤須在銷售點展示於產品上。未達到冰箱最低能效水平的型號不得合法銷售，標籤評級作為EOS合格評定及GOEIC進口管制的一部分予以核查。埃及電網基準為220 V、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian energy-efficiency label scheme for household refrigerators (mandatory; administered by EOS with the energy-efficiency authority)
ES standards adopting IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for the energy class)
ES IEC 60335-2-24 — particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (referenced for product scope and ratings)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It sets energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label (CEL) system administered by NDRC. Products must display the China Energy Label before sale. GB 12021.2 uses a grade-based framework with a Chinese test methodology; the resulting Chinese grade is not directly comparable to the Egyptian energy-efficiency class and does not carry over to the Egyptian label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，能效标识制度由国家发展改革委（NDRC）管理。产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 12021.2采用基于等级的框架及中国试验方法；所得中国等级与埃及能效等级不可直接比较，且不能套用至埃及标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，能效標識制度由國家發展改革委（NDRC）管理。產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 12021.2採用基於等級的框架及中國試驗方法；所得中國等級與埃及能效等級不可直接比較，且不能套用至埃及標籤。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; SAMR/NDRC China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps block direct reuse of Chinese energy compliance: (1) Different label scheme — the Egyptian energy-efficiency class is assigned under the Egyptian scheme thresholds based on IEC 62552 measurement; a Chinese GB 12021.2 Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not automatically map to the Egyptian energy class and is not displayed as the Egyptian label. The model must be tested and rated to the Egyptian methodology and the Egyptian label affixed. (2) Minimum-efficiency cut-off — refrigerators below the minimum energy-efficiency level set for the Egyptian market cannot be sold, so a model that only clears China's Grade 5 floor may fail Egypt's minimum. Exporters should confirm the current Egyptian energy class thresholds and the accepted IEC 62552 test report with EOS before manufacturing for the Egyptian market.
gap.zh: 两项差距阻碍直接沿用中国能效合规：（1）标签方案不同——埃及能效等级在埃及方案门槛下、基于IEC 62552测量评定；中国GB 12021.2的1级或2级评级不会自动映射至埃及能效等级，也不能作为埃及标签展示。型号须按埃及方法检测评级并附贴埃及标签。（2）最低能效门槛——低于埃及市场所设最低能效水平的冰箱不得销售，因此仅达到中国5级下限的型号可能不符合埃及最低要求。出口商在为埃及市场生产前，应向EOS确认当前埃及能效等级门槛及接受的IEC 62552检测报告。
gap.zht: 兩項差距阻礙直接沿用中國能效合規：（1）標籤方案不同——埃及能效等級在埃及方案門檻下、基於IEC 62552測量評定；中國GB 12021.2的1級或2級評級不會自動映射至埃及能效等級，也不能作為埃及標籤展示。型號須按埃及方法檢測評級並附貼埃及標籤。（2）最低能效門檻——低於埃及市場所設最低能效水平的冰箱不得銷售，因此僅達到中國5級下限的型號可能不符合埃及最低要求。出口商在為埃及市場生產前，應向EOS確認當前埃及能效等級門檻及接受的IEC 62552檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the EOS energy-efficiency label is legally required for household refrigerators placed on the Egyptian market; energy class checked during EOS conformity assessment and GOEIC import control
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EOS energy-efficiency label is a mandatory gate for selling refrigerators in Egypt. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not transfer — the model must be tested to the IEC 62552 basis and rated and labelled under the Egyptian scheme, and must clear Egypt's minimum energy-efficiency level. Confirm current thresholds and accepted test reports with EOS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EOS能效标签是在埃及销售冰箱的强制性门槛。中国GB 12021.2等级不可转移——型号须按IEC 62552基准检测、按埃及方案评级并贴标，且须达到埃及最低能效水平。应向EOS确认当前门槛及接受的检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EOS能效標籤是在埃及銷售冰箱的強制性門檻。中國GB 12021.2等級不可轉移——型號須按IEC 62552基準檢測、按埃及方案評級並貼標，且須達到埃及最低能效水平。應向EOS確認當前門檻及接受的檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Measurement Methodology and Label Display Obligations for the Egyptian Market
requirement_topic.zh: 埃及市场的能效测量方法与标签展示义务
requirement_topic.zht: 埃及市場的能效測量方法與標籤展示義務

summary.en: For the Egyptian energy class to be assigned, the refrigerator's energy consumption must be measured using the test methodology in the ES standard that adopts the IEC 62552 series (characteristics and test methods for household refrigerating appliances). The measured annual energy consumption, rated volumes per compartment, and climate-class performance feed the Egyptian energy-efficiency class calculation. The supplier or its Egyptian importer is responsible for ensuring the correct Egyptian-format energy-efficiency label is printed in Arabic, affixed to the appliance, and visible at point of sale. EOS verifies the label and the supporting test evidence during conformity assessment, and GOEIC may check the label during import inspection at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta. Energy consumption figures are referenced to a 220 V, 50 Hz supply, consistent with the Egyptian grid.
summary.zh: 为评定埃及能效等级，冰箱的能耗须采用采纳IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具的特性与试验方法）的ES标准中的试验方法进行测量。所测年耗电量、各隔间额定容积及气候等级表现用于埃及能效等级计算。供应商或其埃及进口商负责确保正确的埃及格式能效标签以阿拉伯文印制、附贴于器具上并在销售点可见。EOS在合格评定中核验标签及支持性检测证据，GOEIC可在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特的进口检验中核查标签。能耗数据以220 V、50 Hz供电为基准，与埃及电网一致。
summary.zht: 為評定埃及能效等級，冰箱的能耗須採用採納IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具的特性與試驗方法）的ES標準中的試驗方法進行測量。所測年耗電量、各隔間額定容積及氣候等級表現用於埃及能效等級計算。供應商或其埃及進口商負責確保正確的埃及格式能效標籤以阿拉伯文印製、附貼於器具上並在銷售點可見。EOS在合格評定中核驗標籤及支持性檢測證據，GOEIC可在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特的進口檢驗中核查標籤。能耗數據以220 V、50 Hz供電為基準，與埃及電網一致。

standards_or_laws: ES standards adopting IEC 62552-1 / 62552-2 / 62552-3 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis)
Egyptian energy-efficiency label display rules — Arabic-language label affixed at point of sale (EOS / energy-efficiency authority)
GOEIC import-inspection verification of the energy label at port of entry

summary.en: In China, refrigerator energy consumption is measured under GB/T 8059-2016 (aligned with the IEC 62552 series) and rated against GB 12021.2-2015. The supplier self-declares the China Energy Label (CEL) grade and consumption figures based on testing, files with the China Energy Label registration system administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR, and displays the Chinese-language CEL on the product before sale. Although the underlying IEC 62552 measurement basis is similar, the Chinese label format, language, grade scale, and registration are domestic; the CEL is not an accepted substitute for the Egyptian energy label.
summary.zh: 在中国，冰箱能耗依据GB/T 8059-2016（与IEC 62552系列一致）测量，并按GB 12021.2-2015评级。供应商基于检测自我声明中国能效标识（CEL）等级及能耗数据，向NDRC/SAMR下属中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理的能效标识备案系统备案，并在销售前于产品上展示中文CEL。尽管底层IEC 62552测量基础相似，但中国标签的格式、语言、等级标度及备案均为国内制度；CEL不被接受为埃及能效标签的替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，冰箱能耗依據GB/T 8059-2016（與IEC 62552系列一致）測量，並按GB 12021.2-2015評級。供應商基於檢測自我聲明中國能效標識（CEL）等級及能耗數據，向NDRC/SAMR下屬中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理的能效標識備案系統備案，並在銷售前於產品上展示中文CEL。儘管底層IEC 62552測量基礎相似，但中國標籤的格式、語言、等級標度及備案均為國內制度；CEL不被接受為埃及能效標籤的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method, aligned with IEC 62552)
GB 12021.2-2015 — energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (rating basis)
China Energy Label registration system (CNIS under NDRC/SAMR)

gap.en: Even though both markets measure on the IEC 62552 basis, the Egyptian label obligation is not satisfied by Chinese practice: (1) Label format and language — Egypt requires the Arabic-language Egyptian energy-efficiency label in the prescribed format; the Chinese CEL cannot be reused. (2) Re-rating — the IEC 62552 test data may need to be presented in the form EOS accepts and re-rated to the Egyptian class boundaries, which differ from China's Grade 1-5 scale. (3) Point-of-sale and import checks — the label must be physically present and correct for EOS conformity assessment and may be checked by GOEIC at the port; a missing or Chinese-only label can delay or block clearance. Exporters should produce the Egyptian label from EOS-accepted IEC 62552 test evidence and ensure their importer applies it before sale.
gap.zh: 尽管两个市场均以IEC 62552为测量基础，埃及标签义务不能由中国实践满足：（1）标签格式与语言——埃及要求采用规定格式的阿拉伯文埃及能效标签；中国CEL不可沿用。（2）重新评级——IEC 62552检测数据可能须以EOS接受的形式呈现，并按不同于中国1-5级标度的埃及等级边界重新评级。（3）销售点与进口核查——标签须实体存在且正确以通过EOS合格评定，并可能在口岸被GOEIC核查；标签缺失或仅有中文可能延误或阻碍通关。出口商应基于EOS接受的IEC 62552检测证据制作埃及标签，并确保进口商在销售前贴附。
gap.zht: 儘管兩個市場均以IEC 62552為測量基礎，埃及標籤義務不能由中國實踐滿足：（1）標籤格式與語言——埃及要求採用規定格式的阿拉伯文埃及能效標籤；中國CEL不可沿用。（2）重新評級——IEC 62552檢測數據可能須以EOS接受的形式呈現，並按不同於中國1-5級標度的埃及等級邊界重新評級。（3）銷售點與進口核查——標籤須實體存在且正確以通過EOS合格評定，並可能在口岸被GOEIC核查；標籤缺失或僅有中文可能延誤或阻礙通關。出口商應基於EOS接受的IEC 62552檢測證據製作埃及標籤，並確保進口商在銷售前貼附。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 62552-based energy measurement and display of the Arabic-language Egyptian energy-efficiency label are required for refrigerators sold in Egypt; verified by EOS and at GOEIC import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 8059 measurement, GB 12021.2 rating and China Energy Label registration/display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt requires an Arabic-language energy-efficiency label produced from IEC 62552-based test evidence and re-rated to the Egyptian class boundaries. The Chinese CEL does not satisfy this obligation. Ensure the Egyptian importer applies the correct label before sale and that EOS-accepted test evidence supports the rating.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及要求基于IEC 62552检测证据制作、并按埃及等级边界重新评级的阿拉伯文能效标签。中国CEL不满足该义务。应确保埃及进口商在销售前贴附正确标签，并以EOS接受的检测证据支持评级。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及要求基於IEC 62552檢測證據製作、並按埃及等級邊界重新評級的阿拉伯文能效標籤。中國CEL不滿足該義務。應確保埃及進口商在銷售前貼附正確標籤，並以EOS接受的檢測證據支持評級。
